depth_prep.title: Craft a Netherite Glider (fire-resistant) or Iron Glider for deep-sea descent

subtitle.text: The ocean floor has been waiting longer than the land.

description: The oil age ends at the shore.
What comes next is below it.
The Pressure mod causes increasing damage
proportional to vertical distance from the nearest air block above.
An air pocket — even 3 blocks directly above you — resets the counter.
Plan your descent with air pockets marked.
Dried Kelp restores hunger in ocean biomes without full inventory stops.
Water Breathing potions from the brewing stand extend safe operating time.
The Glider mod's Netherite tier is fire-resistant for Nether dives.
Iron tier is sufficient for ocean descent.
→ Craft a Glider for controlled descent [check]
→ Craft a Turtle Helmet (scute from baby turtles maturing)
